_README: SCHEMA + field docs for a person record. Copy the shape below for new people. This file documents each field; it is not a real person. Use backend/memory/schemas.py:new_person() to generate a blank record programmatically.

_field_docs.id: Stable unique id, e.g. 'person_taylor_001'. Must match the catalog card id.
_field_docs.first_name / middle_name / last_name: Name parts; any may be empty.
_field_docs.aliases: Other ways the user refers to them, incl. relationship words like 'my girlfriend'.
_field_docs.birthday: ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' (year may be approximate). Age is computed on demand, never stored stale.
_field_docs.preferences: Free-form object of misc preferences (key -> value).
_field_docs.conversation_notes: List of {text, date, source} captured from chats.
_field_docs.confidence: 0.0-1.0 how sure A.P.E.X. is about this record overall.
